description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely male, rendered in a stylized, elongated form with a textured surface. The figure is dressed in a long coat and stands upright on a tall, faceted pedestal made of stone or concrete. The base is set within a brick-paved area, flanked by two curved stone or concrete benches with embedded circular plaques or medallions. The sculpture's surface appears dark and metallic, contrasting with the lighter, rougher pedestal. The surrounding ground features a mix of red brick, concrete, and patches of grass, suggesting an outdoor installation. The overall composition is solemn and commemorative, with the figure gazing forward in a dignified pose.
description: A stylized standing human figure in a long coat atop a tall stone pedestal, set within a brick-paved outdoor area with curved benches and plaques.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal detail of the figure, the long coat, and the facial features, with both curved benches and plaques visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the depth of the pedestal, with one curved bench and plaque more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and coat, as well as the pedestal's structure and the brickwork behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile from the opposite side, with the other curved bench and plaque more visible.
attribute_subject_matter: standing human figure in a long coat
attribute_location_context: Outdoor brick-paved plaza or walkway with adjacent grass and concrete paths.
